text.title: Dependency Spike Kill-Criteria Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Dependency Spike Kill-Criteria Template end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: pre-commit
step.input: candidate dependency name + critical path it touches
step.action: Draft ≥3 criteria, each with axis, operator, threshold, measurement source. Time-stamp the file.

step.name: timebox
step.action: Set timebox (≤2 days). Record start ISO-8601 timestamp.

step.name: execute-spike
step.action: Run spike against criteria; measure each axis using the declared tool; record results.

step.name: verdict
step.action: If any criterion fails → verdict=kill. If all pass → verdict=adopt. If timebox elapsed without measurement → verdict=continue with new timebox required.

step.name: archive
step.action: Persist artefact regardless of verdict; kill verdicts become future avoidance signal.
